info.title: DiagramForge — Diagram text to SVG renderer

options.name: --output
options.description: Write SVG to a file instead of stdout

options.name: --theme
options.description:
Use a built-in named theme:
default, zinc-light, zinc-dark, dark, neutral, forest, presentation, prism, angled-light, angled-dark, github-light, github-dark, nord, nord-light, dracula, tokyo-night, tokyo-night-storm, tokyo-night-light, catppuccin-latte, catppuccin-mocha, solarized-light, solarized-dark, one-dark

options.name: --palette
options.description:
JSON array of hex colors for node palette, e.g. '["#FF0000","#00FF00"]'
Overrides the node palette of the selected theme.

options.name: --theme-file
options.description: Load a complete theme from a JSON file.

options.name: --transparent
options.description: Omit the SVG background rect for embedding on an existing surface.

options.name: --list-themes
options.description:
Print all built-in theme names, one per line, and exit.
Supported syntaxes:
mermaid                       Flowchart LR/TB (Mermaid subset)
conceptual                    Matrix, Pyramid

arguments.name: INPUT_FILE
arguments.description: Path to the diagram source file (Mermaid or Conceptual DSL)
